_architecture.name: IslandPilot
_architecture.summary: Multi-island evolutionary pipeline that discovers market regimes, evolves per-regime execution configs via genetic algorithm, and applies them at runtime with adaptive position sizing.
_architecture.research_basis: Phase4 research: hierarchical GMM regime discovery + island-model GA
_architecture.training_description: Discovers market regimes from 5yr data, then evolves optimal execution configs per regime using genetic algorithm (~5-15 min).
training_steps: Select top features via mutual information
Evolve per-regime configs via island-model GA (100 generations)
Save trained models for runtime use

layers.name: FeaturePool
layers.description: Computes ~25 market features across volatility, trend, chop, momentum, and structure categories
layers.algorithm: Indicator-based feature extraction (NATR, ADX, EMA slopes, Hurst, RSI, etc.)

layers.name: RegimeTree
layers.description: Hierarchical GMM clustering — macro regimes split into sub-regimes
layers.algorithm: Gaussian Mixture Model with BIC model selection at both levels

config_keys.min_island_cycles: Min samples per island before merging (default: 200)

layers.name: IslandEvolver
layers.description: Per-regime genetic algorithm with sibling migration
layers.algorithm: Tournament selection, uniform crossover, Gaussian mutation, elitism
layers.output: Best execution config (genome) per regime island

layers.name: RegimeInferencer
layers.description: Runtime regime classification with sticky hysteresis to prevent whipsaw
layers.algorithm: Soft GMM probabilities + hard config switching with margin threshold

layers.name: AdaptiveSizer
layers.description: Multi-factor position sizing: confidence × drawdown × base, bounded by SafetySizing
layers.algorithm: Three multiplicative factors with hard caps

lifecycle.description: FeaturePool computes features → RegimeInferencer classifies regime → applies genome
Blocks if confidence < threshold or in grace period after regime switch
AdaptiveSizer scales position by confidence × drawdown factor
Injects evolved TP/hedge distances from active genome
Aborts cycle if danger exceeds evolved aggressiveness threshold
Records outcome for fitness tracking and potential online learning

composition_rules.gate_entry: AND — all pipelines must allow (any veto blocks)
composition_rules.suggest_exit: Most aggressive action wins (close_all > partial > tighten_sl > set_tp)
composition_rules.filter_order: Sequential chain — any None cancels the order

layers.name: RiskShield
layers.description: Conformal kill + liquidity gate + margin survival

_architecture.summary: Three-layer protection pipeline for grid/martingale strategies. Scores market danger, gates risky entries, and aborts losing cycles via Q-learning.
_architecture.research_basis: Phase2 research: 20yr EUR-USD, 60,370 cycles, 103 busts analyzed
_architecture.training_description: Ships with pre-trained models from Phase2 research. Ready to use immediately.

layers.name: DangerScorer
layers.description: Real-time market risk assessment producing a danger score in [0, 1]
layers.algorithm: Weighted sum of 7 z-scored features → sigmoid normalization
layers.output: Single float [0, 1] per candle (0 = safe, 1 = dangerous)

features.description: Daily range / ATR — low = choppy = danger
ADX trend strength (5m) — low = no trend = danger
Hurst exponent (5m) — near 0.5 = random walk = danger

layers.normalization: Welford online normalizer (seeded with pre-trained stats from 60K cycles)

config_keys.warmup: Candles before scoring begins (default: 50, 0 if seeded)

layers.name: EntryGate
layers.description: Blocks strategy entries when danger exceeds a rolling percentile threshold
layers.algorithm: Rolling window percentile threshold on danger scores
layers.output: Boolean allow/block decision per entry attempt
layers.mechanism: Maintains sorted rolling window → computes Nth percentile → blocks if danger > threshold

config_keys.percentile: Block threshold as percentile of recent scores (default: 80 = block top 20%)

layers.name: QAbort
layers.description: Tabular Q-learning agent that decides whether to abort a losing cycle mid-trade
layers.output: Binary action: continue or abort (force close_all)

modes.name: eval
modes.description: Frozen policy — no learning, no exploration (production)

config_keys.mode: Operating mode: eval, train, or online (default: eval)

lifecycle.description: DangerScorer extracts features and updates score every candle
EntryGate checks danger vs threshold, blocks if too high
Records danger at entry, starts Q-learning episode
QAbort evaluates state and may force close_all
Feeds P&L reward to Q-learner, snapshots convergence

composition_rules.gate_entry: AND — all pipelines must allow (any veto blocks)
composition_rules.suggest_exit: Most aggressive action wins (close_all > partial > tighten_sl > set_tp)
composition_rules.filter_order: Sequential chain — any None cancels the order

_architecture.summary: GTSBot grid trading pipeline with trend filtering, grid spacing enforcement, and basket equity management.

layers.name: TrendFilter
layers.description: EMA-smoothed derivative trend classification (replaces paper SCG NN + TCB).

layers.name: GridManager
layers.description: Grid spacing enforcement: x-threshold (time), y-threshold (price), max ops.

layers.name: BasketManager
layers.description: Basket equity monitoring — closes all when profit target reached.
